name: Unemployment benefits (Texas Workforce Commission)
description: If you were laid off or had your hours reduced through no fault of your own, apply at twc.texas.gov. You'll also need to register at WorkInTexas.com — which doubles as another job board worth searching.

name: 211 Texas / United Way HelpLine
description: Call 2-1-1 or visit 211texas.org for rent, utility, and food assistance referrals in your area.

name: Workforce Solutions (or your local workforce board)
description: Houston-area job seekers can get free resume help, job search assistance, and — in some cases — training funds toward an additional certification. Search "[your city] workforce solutions" or "[your state] workforce board" to find your local office.

name: Outside Texas
description: Search "[your state] unemployment benefits" and "211 [your state]" for the equivalent programs.
